headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Reiterates Overweight on Digital Realty Trust, Maintains $211 Price Target
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Brett Knoblauch   reiterates Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) with a Overweight and maintains $211 price target.
